title: ozothamnus obcordatus subsp. major
intro: Ozothamnus obcordatus subsp. major, also known as the white dust bush, is a shrub native to Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ozothamnus obcordatus subsp. major include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
